title: polygala vulgaris subsp. multicaulis
intro: Polygala vulgaris subsp. multicaulis, commonly known as the common polygala or multicaule polygala, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the milkwort family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala vulgaris subsp. multicaulis include its potential to improve immune function, reduce stress and anxiety, and support cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a powder or capsule supplement.
